wio_buttons_setup.tooltip: Initialize A/B/C and the 5-way switch, then tick OneButton automatically in the main loop

wio_button_is_pressed.tooltip: Check the debounced state of the selected button

wio_switch_is_pressed.tooltip: Check the debounced state of the selected 5-way switch direction

wio_control_on_event.tooltip: Handle the selected button or switch direction with OneButton events

wio_control_set_debounce_ms.message0: set Wio button %1 debounce time to %2 ms
wio_control_set_debounce_ms.tooltip: Set the debounce time for the selected button

wio_control_set_click_ms.message0: set Wio button %1 click interval to %2 ms
wio_control_set_click_ms.tooltip: Set the detection interval for single, double and multiple clicks

wio_control_set_press_ms.message0: set Wio button %1 long press time to %2 ms
wio_control_set_press_ms.tooltip: Set the time before a long press starts

wio_control_set_long_press_interval_ms.message0: set Wio button %1 long press callback interval to %2 ms
wio_control_set_long_press_interval_ms.tooltip: Set the repeated callback interval during a long press

wio_control_is_long_pressed.tooltip: Check whether the selected button is in the OneButton long-pressed state

wio_control_get_pressed_ms.tooltip: Get the current pressed duration in milliseconds

wio_control_get_number_clicks.tooltip: Get the most recent click count recorded by OneButton

wio_control_reset.tooltip: Reset the OneButton state machine for the selected button
